_instructions.purpose: Copy this file to local-config.json and edit it for the target machine.
_instructions.do_not_commit: Do not commit local-config.json. It is machine-specific.
must_update: x_reader.command if PowerShell is not available as 'powershell' on the target machine
x_reader.args[3] so it points to the real invoke_x_reader.ps1 on the target machine
obsidian.vault_path unless your workflow always passes -VaultPath at runtime
notes: This example is a template only. Do not reuse the paths below without editing them.
The invoke_x_reader.ps1 path should normally point to the same deployed skill folder that contains this config file.
If OpenClaw deploys the skill into its own workspace, update the path to that workspace copy, not your development copy.
If your workflow always provides VaultPath at runtime, obsidian.vault_path may be left empty.
